# toktap

> Transparent LLM API proxy that extracts token usage from SSE streams and writes metrics to InfluxDB. Transparent WebSocket tunneling for Codex CLI (Responses API). Optional conversation recording for training data collection. ~0.1ms overhead. Supports Anthropic, OpenAI, OpenRouter, xAI.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/voska/toktap/blob/master/README.md): Project overview, quick start, configuration, recording, benchmarks
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/voska/toktap/blob/master/AGENTS.md): Architecture, code layout, route config, recorder, technical details
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/voska/toktap/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md): Release history

## Links
